grok is one of the biggest scam LLM you will find.

ask Rashid, why is it publiced... he can tell you for sure...

comment.body:
it is not true that AI is good for traveling.
I went back to may parents last week. 
i was invited to the Budapest Opera for a balett.
the train was late, i had to hurry up,
my friends waited for me at the station.

one of them took out the phone and ask AI app to tell the shortest way to the opern.
it was like 5 min late on that way.
i said, nah nah, it's bullshit, i know how to go there...
even told them: mannn, you live here, why do you need to check by phone?

and we arrived right in time, after i fought with them to follow my way.
with the app's way it would have been even longer.

and i don't even live in Budapest...
